extra_commands: echo '===== ERROR LOG mtime =====' && date -r ~/.pm2/logs/qrbanner-error.log '+%Y-%m-%d_%H:%M:%S' 2>&1 && echo 'now='$(date '+%Y-%m-%d_%H:%M:%S')
echo '===== OUT LOG grep last 120 =====' && tail -n 1500 ~/.pm2/logs/qrbanner-out.log 2>&1 | grep -iE 'reset|login|authorize|verified|invalid|error|ytanlik|password' | tail -80
